# Jjuuko Ronald — Portfolio (Vanilla)

## About
Personal portfolio site for Jjuuko Ronald, a Full Stack Web & Mobile App Developer based in Kampala, Uganda. Built with vanilla HTML/CSS/JS.

## Tech Stack
- HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JS
- Font: Ubuntu (Google Fonts)
- Icons: Simple Icons (dev icons), inline SVGs
- No frameworks, no build step — static files

## Pages
- `/index.html` — Home (hero, about, experience, skills, contact)
- `/projects.html` — Project showcase
- `/services.html` — Service offerings

## Design System
- Dark theme with CSS custom properties (`:root` in styles.css)
- Primary color: `oklch(0.65 0.20 250)` (blue)
- Card background: `oklch(0.13 0.005 240)`
- Surface: `oklch(0.17 0.006 240)`
- Muted text: `oklch(0.66 0.015 240)`
- Border: `oklch(0.22 0.008 240 / 0.7)`

## Key Features
- Fixed nav with active pill indicator (JS-driven)
- Hero with animated tech icon rings (42 icons, 3 concentric rings)
- Experience timeline with left-side line and dot markers
- Skill progress bars with scroll-triggered animation
- Scroll-margin-top offsets for fixed nav
- Fade-in animations on scroll
- Staggered card animations
- CSS `color-mix()` for hover glow effects
- Mobile responsive with hamburger menu

## File Structure
```
public/vanilla/
├── index.html        — Home page
├── projects.html     — Projects
├── services.html     — Services
├── styles.css        — All styles (~1370 lines)
├── app.js            — JS (nav pill, scroll, animations)
└── llms.txt          — This file
```

## Profile Data
- Name: Jjuuko Ronald
- Email: ronaldjjuuko7@gmail.com
- Phone: +256 703 283 529
- Location: Kampala, Uganda
- Role: Full Stack Web & Mobile App Developer

## Navigation Behavior
- Links to `#about`, `#experience`, `#skills`, `#contact` are on-page anchor scrolls
- Links to `/projects.html`, `/services.html` navigate to other pages
- Active nav pill is dynamically positioned via JS
- All pages use root-relative paths for links and `../favicon.png` for favicon
